title: The Lost Child – Flashcard Concept Mastery
author: Mulk Raj Anand

questions.question: Where was the child going with his parents?
questions.explanation: The story begins with the child walking with his parents towards a spring festival fair.

questions.question: Why did the child lag behind while walking to the fair?
questions.correct_answer: Because he was fascinated by the toys and sights on the way
questions.explanation: The child kept stopping to look at interesting things like toys, flowers, and insects.

questions.question: Which sweet did the child want at the fair?
questions.explanation: The child was attracted to the sweet shop and especially wanted burfi.

questions.question: What colourful object caught the child’s attention at the fair?
questions.explanation: The bright red, yellow, green, and purple balloons fascinated the child.

questions.question: What ride did the child ask his parents to take him on?
questions.explanation: The child saw people enjoying the ride and wanted to join them.

questions.question: When did the child realize that he had lost his parents?
questions.correct_answer: When he turned around and could not find them in the crowd
questions.explanation: After asking for a ride on the roundabout, the child noticed his parents were missing.

questions.question: What did the child do after realizing he was lost?
questions.correct_answer: He cried loudly and searched for his parents
questions.explanation: The child panicked and ran around shouting for his mother and father.

questions.question: Who helped the lost child in the crowd?
questions.correct_answer: A kind man in the fair
questions.explanation: The man picked up the crying child and tried to comfort him.

questions.question: What did the man offer the child to make him happy?
questions.correct_answer: Sweets, balloons, flowers, and a ride on the roundabout
questions.explanation: The man tried several attractions from the fair to calm the child.

questions.question: Why did the child refuse everything offered by the man?
questions.correct_answer: Because he only wanted his mother and father
questions.explanation: After losing his parents, the child realized their importance and cared about nothing else.

notes.title: Importance of Parents
notes.content: The story shows that a child’s greatest need is the love and security of parents.

notes.title: Change in Desires
notes.content: The child initially wants many things at the fair, but after getting lost he only wants his parents.

facts.fact: The story 'The Lost Child' is written by Mulk Raj Anand.
The fair in the story takes place during the festival of spring.
